mapei-mapeset.name: MAPESET
mapei-mapeset.description: Cementitious adhesive with no vertical slip for internal and external bonding of ceramic tiles and mosaics, single-fired and double-fired tiles for floors and walls.
application_areas: Ceramic tiles, mosaics, single- & double-fired tiles

mapei-keraset.name: KERASET
mapei-keraset.description: Dry-set mortar for interior/exterior residential and light commercial floor and wall applications. C1 classification when mixed with water.
mapei-keraset.classification_detail: Normal cementitious adhesive (C1 with water; C2ES1P1 with Keraply additive)

strength.bond: Exceeds ANSI A118.1 (with water); ANSI A118.4/A118.11 (with Keraply)

application_areas: Interior/exterior floor and wall residential & light commercial

mapei-kerabond-t.name: KERABOND T
mapei-kerabond-t.description: Cementitious adhesive with no vertical slip for ceramic tiles (thickness of adhesive up to 5 mm).

coverage.notes: Mosaics ~2-3, medium tiles ~4-5, large tiles >6, spot-bonding insulation 0.5-1.5

mapei-kerabond-plus.name: KERABOND PLUS
mapei-kerabond-plus.description: Improved cementitious adhesive with extended open time for bonding all types of ceramic tile and mosaic on internal and external floors, walls and ceilings.
mapei-kerabond-plus.classification_detail: Cementitious (C), improved (2), extended open time (E). When mixed with Isolastic: C2ES2

mapei-adesilex-p7.name: ADESILEX P7
mapei-adesilex-p7.description: High-performance cementitious adhesive with no vertical slip for ceramic and porcelain tiles. Interior and exterior bonding of ceramic tiles, porcelain and mosaics.

mapei-adesilex-p9.name: ADESILEX P9
mapei-adesilex-p9.description: High-performance cementitious adhesive with no vertical slip and extended open time for ceramic, vitrified and mosaic tiles, stone.
mapei-adesilex-p9.classification_detail: Cementitious (C), improved (2), slip resistant (T), extended open time (E)

mapei-adesilex-p10.name: ADESILEX P10
mapei-adesilex-p10.description: High-performance cementitious adhesive for glass/ceramic/vitrified/marble mosaic and stone tiles.
mapei-adesilex-p10.classification_detail: Improved (2) slip-resistant (T) cementitious (C) extended open time (E)

mapei-keraflex.name: KERAFLEX
mapei-keraflex.description: Cementitious adhesive with good deformability, excellent bond, high performance, extended open time and no vertical slip. Suitable for ceramic and natural stone, perfect for mosaic.
mapei-keraflex.classification_detail: Improved (2) slip-resistant (T) cementitious (C) extended open time (E)

mapei-keraflex-maxi-s1-zero.name: KERAFLEX MAXI S1 ZERO
mapei-keraflex-maxi-s1-zero.description: High-performance, deformable, grey and ultra-white cementitious adhesive with no vertical slip, extended open time, and Low Dust technology. Carbon-neutral product (CO2 offset via certified carbon credits). Designed for ceramic and natural stone tiles, excellent for large-format tiles.
mapei-keraflex-maxi-s1-zero.classification_detail: Cementitious (C), improved (2), slip-resistant (T), extended open time (E), deformable (S1)

mapei-ultralite-s2-flex.name: ULTRALITE S2 FLEX
mapei-ultralite-s2-flex.description: One-component, high-performance, highly deformable, lightweight cementitious adhesive with extended open time, Low Dust technology and extremely high yield. Specifically for large-format tiles including external facades and insulation systems.
mapei-ultralite-s2-flex.classification_detail: Cementitious (C), improved (2), anti-slip (T), extended open time (E), highly deformable (S2)

coverage.notes: Lightweight — 13.5 kg bag = same volume as 20 kg standard bag

mapei-granirapid.name: GRANIRAPID
mapei-granirapid.description: Two-component, rapid-setting cementitious adhesive for bonding ceramic tiles and stone with extraordinary bonding and fast-setting characteristics. Suitable for rapid re-tiling where flooring must be ready within short times.

mapei-keralastic-t.name: KERALASTIC T
mapei-keralastic-t.description: Two-component high-performance polyurethane adhesive (thixotropic version) for ceramic tiles and stone. Particularly suitable for vertical applications. Essential for natural stone/agglomerates subject to movement and moisture.
mapei-keralastic-t.classification_detail: Improved (2) reaction resin (R) polyurethane adhesive with no vertical slip (T)
application_areas: Metal, wood, fibre-cement, rubber, PVC, linoleum

mapei-kerapoxy-adhesive.name: KERAPOXY ADHESIVE
mapei-kerapoxy-adhesive.description: Two-component, epoxy resin-based, high-strength adhesive with silica sand. Thixotropic mix for internal/external bonding of ceramic, porcelain and stone to floors and walls at thicknesses up to 1 cm in a single coat.
mapei-kerapoxy-adhesive.classification_detail: Improved (2) reaction resin (R) with no vertical slip (T)
mapei-kerapoxy-adhesive.thickness_range: Up to 10 mm in one coat

mapei-mapecryll-eco.name: MAPECRYLL ECO
mapei-mapecryll-eco.description: Ready-to-use, high-performance, paste tile adhesive for indoor wall tiling. Solvent-free, very low VOC emissions (EMICODE EC1 Plus).
mapei-mapecryll-eco.classification_detail: Improved (2) dispersion adhesive (D) with no vertical slip (T) and extended open time (E)

mapei-adesilex-g19.name: ADESILEX G19
mapei-adesilex-g19.description: Two-component epoxy-polyurethane adhesive for bonding rubber, PVC, vinyl, textile, and linoleum floor coverings. Specifically developed for rubber athletic tracks and areas under heavy mechanical stress.

coverage.notes: ~20 m²/10 kg; 10 m²/5 kg; 4 m²/2 kg

mapei-adesilex-g19.notes: Also available as ADESILEX G19 FR (fire-resistant EN 45545-2 HL1-HL2) and ADESILEX G19 FAST (rapid setting)

mapei-keracolor-ff.name: KERACOLOR FF
mapei-keracolor-ff.description: High-performance, polymer-modified cementitious mortar with water-repellent DropEffect® technology for grouting joints up to 6 mm. Suitable for interior/exterior floors and walls.
mapei-keracolor-ff.classification_detail: Improved (2) cementitious (CG) grout with reduced water absorption (W) and high abrasion resistance (A). EN 13888 / ISO 13007-3

coverage.notes: Depends on joint width, tile size and thickness

mapei-ultracolor-plus.name: ULTRACOLOR PLUS
mapei-ultracolor-plus.description: High-performance, quick-setting, polymer-modified, Portland-cement-free cementitious grout with water-repellent DropEffect® and anti-mould BioBlock® technology. For joints 2-20 mm. Anti-efflorescence.
mapei-ultracolor-plus.classification_detail: Improved (2) cementitious (CG) grout, reduced water absorption (W), high abrasion resistance (A). EN 13888 / ISO 13007-3 CG2WAF
application_areas: All types of ceramic, stone, glass/marble mosaic

mapei-kerapoxy.name: KERAPOXY
mapei-kerapoxy.description: Two-component acid-resistant high-performance epoxy grout for grouting ceramic tiles and stone material. For joints of at least 3 mm. Also usable as an adhesive.
mapei-kerapoxy.classification_detail: Reactive resin (R) grout (G), high chemical resistance. EN 13888

mapei-mapegrout-me-05.name: MAPEGROUT ME05
mapei-mapegrout-me-05.description: Pre-blended powder of selected cement, aggregates, and special additives designed to be shrinkage compensated. Forms a fluid micro-concrete for pouring/pumping into formwork without segregation. For pile cap treatment, column jacketing, and structural repair.
mapei-mapegrout-me-05.mix_ratio: 3.1-3.3 L water per 25 kg (or with Mapecure SRA)

mapei-mapegrout-me-06.name: MAPEGROUT ME06
mapei-mapegrout-me-06.description: High-strength, shrinkage-compensated, super-flow micro-concrete. Used for structural repair where thickness and deterioration require high-flow concrete, and for grouting gaps 30-250 mm thick.
mapei-mapegrout-me-06.mix_ratio: 100 parts powder : 12.4-13.6 parts water (3.1-3.4 L per bag)

mapei-mapegrout-t60-me.name: MAPEGROUT T60 ME
mapei-mapegrout-t60-me.description: Thixotropic, sulphate and chloride resistant, fibre-reinforced structural repair mortar. For repairs to new and old concrete structures subject to aggressive atmospheric conditions including chloride and sulphate attack.
mapei-mapegrout-t60-me.classification: EN 1504-3 R4 class structural repair mortar
mapei-mapegrout-t60-me.thickness_range: Up to 50 mm/layer (vertical), 20 mm/layer (ceiling, no formwork)
mapei-mapegrout-t60-me.mix_ratio: 100 parts powder : 15 parts water + 0.25% Mapecure SRA

mapei-mapegrout-t80-me.name: MAPEGROUT T80 ME
mapei-mapegrout-t80-me.description: Single-component sulphate and chloride resistant, fibre-reinforced thixotropic mortar for repair of concrete. Higher strength version of T60. Suitable for new/old concrete subject to chloride and sulphate attack.
mapei-mapegrout-t80-me.classification: EN 1504-3 R4 class structural repair mortar
mapei-mapegrout-t80-me.mix_ratio: 100 parts powder : 15-17 parts water + 0.25% Mapecure SRA

mapei-mapefill-gp-me.name: MAPEFILL GP ME
mapei-mapefill-gp-me.description: Pre-blended powdered grout based on high-strength cement, graded aggregates (1.2 mm diameter) and special additives with an expansive agent. Total absence of shrinkage (ASTM C940) in the plastic phase. Very highly fluid grout for filling intricate spaces.
mapei-mapefill-gp-me.classification: EN 1504-9 / EN 1504-6 compliant (general purpose non-shrink grout)

strength.compressive: High early flexural and compressive strength

application_areas: Grouting base plates and bridge bearings
Anchoring mechanical equipment and steel bars

mapei-mapefill-sp-me.name: MAPEFILL SP ME
mapei-mapefill-sp-me.description: Pre-blended powdered grout with high-strength cement, graded aggregates and expansive agent. Very high early strength. Total absence of shrinkage in plastic phase (ASTM C940) and expansion in hardened phase (ASTM C878). For precision anchoring.
mapei-mapefill-sp-me.classification: Non-shrink precision grout (ASTM C940, ASTM C878)
mapei-mapefill-sp-me.thickness_max: 60 mm (single pour for connecting precast elements)

mapei-planitop-110-me.name: PLANITOP 110 ME
mapei-planitop-110-me.description: Single-component, normal setting cementitious mortar for smoothing concrete surfaces. Protection, smoothing and levelling of concrete surface imperfections up to 2 mm in a single application. Fine-aggregate mortar with synthetic polymers.
mapei-planitop-110-me.mix_ratio: 100 parts powder : 31-32 parts water (6.2-6.4 L per bag)

mapei-adesilex-pg2-tg.name: ADESILEX PG2 TG
mapei-adesilex-pg2-tg.description: Two-component epoxy resin-based structural bonding adhesive with fine-grain aggregates. Thixotropic, applicable on vertical surfaces up to 1 cm in single layer. Hardens without shrinkage. Specifically for high temperatures (+25°C to +50°C).
application_areas: Bonding fresh concrete to hardened concrete

mapei-mapefix-ep-100.name: MAPEFIX EP 100
mapei-mapefix-ep-100.description: Two-component pure epoxy resin chemical anchor. Certified for threaded bar and rebar in rough or smooth (core-drilled) holes in all types of building materials. Certified for seismic loads (C1 and C2 classes). Suitable for damp/wet/underwater holes.
mapei-mapefix-ep-100.classification: ETA Option 1 (tension/compression), Option 7, REBAR, seismic C1/C2; CE marked
mapei-mapefix-ep-100.final_set: 10-12 hours dry substrate, 20-24 hours wet substrate (at +20°C)

mapei-planigrout-300-me.name: PLANIGROUT 300 ME
mapei-planigrout-300-me.description: Three-component, multi-purpose fluid epoxy resin grout with selected well-graded aggregates. Free flowing, specifically developed for heavy-duty structural support under static and dynamic loads.

mapei-planigrout-300-me-pct.name: PLANIGROUT 300 ME PCT
mapei-planigrout-300-me-pct.description: Three-component, castable, impermeable epoxy grout for pile cap treatment (PCT). Specifically for treatment of pile heads with Mapeplan range of synthetic membranes and other waterproofing materials.
application_areas: Pile head treatment with waterproofing membranes
Under Mapeplan and other synthetic membrane systems

mapei-eporip.name: EPORIP
mapei-eporip.description: Two-component solvent-free epoxy adhesive for monolithic sealing of cracks in screeds and for bonding of fresh concrete to hardened concrete (cold construction joints).

mapei-mapelastic-smart.name: MAPELASTIC SMART
mapei-mapelastic-smart.description: Two-component, high-flexibility cementitious mortar with crack-bridging >2 mm. For waterproofing balconies, terraces, bathrooms, swimming pools, water tanks, potable water structures. Applied by trowel/roller/spray.
pack_size: 30 kg kit (A=20 kg bag + B=10 kg drum)
application_areas: Swimming pools, channels, dams, water tanks
mapei-mapelastic-smart.reinforcement: Mapetex Sel N or Mapenet 150 mesh

mapei-mapelastic-easy.name: MAPELASTIC EASY
mapei-mapelastic-easy.description: Two-component acrylic-modified cementitious, flexible waterproof coating easy to apply. For waterproofing balconies, terraces, and bathrooms.

mapei-mapelastic-aquadefense.name: MAPELASTIC AQUADEFENSE
mapei-mapelastic-aquadefense.description: Ready-to-use, ultra-quick-drying, flexible one-component liquid rubber membrane for internal and external waterproofing. Light blue synthetic resin paste in water dispersion. Dries in 30-50 minutes; flood-testable in 12 hours.
mapei-mapelastic-aquadefense.classification: ANSI A118.10-LV and A118.12; AS/NZS 4858:2004 Class III; AS 4654.1-2012
mapei-mapelastic-aquadefense.recoat_wait: ~1 hour between first and second coat
mapei-mapelastic-aquadefense.tile_wait: 3-4 hours (C2F adhesive: tiles + grout then 12 hr to foot traffic)

mapei-mapetex-sel-n.name: MAPETEX SEL N
mapei-mapetex-sel-n.description: Non-woven polypropylene reinforcement fabric for use with Mapelastic Turbo and Mapelastic Smart flexible cementitious waterproofing membranes. Improves toughness, punch-resistance, elongation and crack-bridging.
application_areas: Reinforcement for Mapelastic Turbo and Mapelastic Smart systems
mapei-mapetex-sel-n.installation: Embed between first and second coat of Mapelastic membrane; overlap 5 cm minimum

mapei-purtop-easy.name: PURTOP EASY
mapei-purtop-easy.description: One-component, elastic polyurethane waterproofing membrane in thick-liquid form for flat roofs, terraces, and balconies. Forms a seamless continuous membrane.

mapei-plastimul-dpc.name: PLASTIMUL DPC
mapei-plastimul-dpc.description: Bitumen waterproofing emulsion for foundations and below-ground applications. Damp Proof Course formulation.

mapei-plastimul-dpm.name: PLASTIMUL DPM
mapei-plastimul-dpm.description: Bitumen/rubber latex flexible waterproofing emulsion. Solvent-free emulsion of selected water-emulsified bitumen, rubber latex, special fillers. Flexible waterproof coating resistant to re-emulsifying after prolonged immersion in slightly acid/alkaline water.

mapei-aquaflex-roof-hr.name: AQUAFLEX ROOF HR
mapei-aquaflex-roof-hr.description: Ready-to-use, white, high-reflectance liquid waterproofing membrane for external applications. Synthetic resin in water dispersion. Forms a continuous flexible membrane. SRI 105 (cool roof). UV-resistant.
mapei-aquaflex-roof-hr.classification: EN 1504-2 coating (C) PI-MC-IR / liquid-applied reflective waterproofing
mapei-aquaflex-roof-hr.recoat_wait: 8-12 hours between first and second coat
application_areas: External coating over ceramic, concrete, metal

mapei-planiseal-88.name: PLANISEAL 88
mapei-planiseal-88.description: One-component osmotic mortar composed of cement-based compound, selected graded aggregates and special synthetic resins. Waterproofs even in presence of negative water pressure (up to 1 atm). Certified for potable water contact.
mapei-planiseal-88.classification: Osmotic (crystalline) cementitious waterproofing — negative pressure rated

mapei-lamposilex.name: LAMPOSILEX
mapei-lamposilex.description: Pre-blended powder binder composed of high-strength cements and special admixtures. Ultra-fast setting hydraulic binder for blocking active water leaks ('flash set').
application_areas: Plugging water ingress in underground structures

mapei-topcem-pronto.name: TOPCEM PRONTO
mapei-topcem-pronto.description: Pre-blended ready-to-use mortar with normal setting and controlled shrinkage, fast-drying screed. Just mix with water. For bonded, unbonded, and floating screeds, with 12-hour trafficable and 4-day fully dry cure.
application_areas: Prior to wood parquet, PVC, linoleum, ceramic

mapei-ultraplan-eco.name: ULTRAPLAN ECO
mapei-ultraplan-eco.description: Self-levelling smoothing compound for interiors. For levelling and smoothing differences in thickness from 1 to 10 mm on new or existing substrates before laying all kinds of floorings.
application_areas: Levelling concrete slabs and cementitious screeds
Under wood parquet, ceramic, resilient flooring

mapei-ultraplan-eco-20.name: ULTRAPLAN ECO 20
mapei-ultraplan-eco-20.description: Rapid hydrating, fast-drying self-levelling compound for interiors, thicknesses 1-10 mm. For substrates requiring high resistance to loads and traffic: hospitals, hotels, theatres, schools, shopping centres.
mapei-ultraplan-eco-20.classification: EN 13813 self-levelling compound; EC1 R Plus

mapei-ultraplan-maxi.name: ULTRAPLAN MAXI
mapei-ultraplan-maxi.description: Ultra-fast drying self-levelling compound for thicknesses from 3 to 40 mm per coat without shrinkage, cracking or crazing. Very high compressive and flexural strength; very low VOC.
mapei-ultraplan-maxi.classification: EN 13813 self-levelling compound with high performance
application_areas: Electric heated floor screeds before tiling

mapei-mapefloor-fc200-me.name: MAPEFLOOR FC200 ME
mapei-mapefloor-fc200-me.description: Two-component epoxy formulate with high solid content used to create multi-layered resin coatings with non-slip or roll-coat/structured finish. Durable high-build epoxy floor coating for light industries.

mapei-mapefloor-finish-450-me.name: MAPEFLOOR FINISH 450 ME
mapei-mapefloor-finish-450-me.description: Two-component, aliphatic, elastic coloured polyurethane finish. High resistance to wear, abrasion, and UV rays. Protective topcoat for outdoor car parks, bridges, and walkways after polyurethane waterproofing.

coverage.unit: kg/m² (depends on application method and surface)

mapei-primer-g.name: PRIMER G
mapei-primer-g.description: Synthetic resin-based primer in water dispersion. Used for treating gypsum or anhydrite surfaces prior to installing ceramic tiles and stone, and to provide even absorption before levelling.
mapei-primer-g.dilution: Neat to 1:3 with water depending on substrate absorption
application_areas: Absorbent substrates before tile laying or screeding

mapei-eco-prim-t-plus.name: ECO PRIM T PLUS
mapei-eco-prim-t-plus.description: Universal acrylic levelling primer for treating absorbent and non-absorbent substrates before applying skim coats, levelling compounds, or cementitious adhesives. Solvent-free, low-odour.
mapei-eco-prim-t-plus.classification: Acrylic resin primer in water dispersion (EMICODE EC1 Plus)
mapei-eco-prim-t-plus.dilution: Neat on non-absorbent substrates; 1:2 with water on cementitious/anhydrite

mapei-eco-prim-grip-plus.name: ECO PRIM GRIP PLUS
mapei-eco-prim-grip-plus.description: Multi-purpose, ready-to-use bonding promoter primer for renders, smoothing compounds and cementitious adhesives. Synthetic resin with bond-promoting silica aggregates. Ideal for tile-on-tile installations. Odourless, solvent-free.
mapei-eco-prim-grip-plus.classification: Bond-promoter primer with aggregates (EMICODE EC1 Plus)
application_areas: Non-absorbent surfaces: epoxy, polyurethane, terrazzo, natural stone
Improving bond of renders on brickwork / concrete blocks

mapei-primer-sn.name: PRIMER SN
mapei-primer-sn.description: Two-component epoxy primer with fillers. Specifically formulated for preliminary priming before applying Mapefloor epoxy/polyurethane resin systems and Ultratop self-levelling cementitious mortars. Radon-barrier compliant (DIN ISO/TS 11665-13).
colors: neutral (may be tinted with Mapecolor Paste)

mapei-primer-mf.name: PRIMER MF
mapei-primer-mf.description: Two-component, solvent-free epoxy primer used as bonding promoter for Mapefloor products, for consolidating and waterproofing against residual damp on cementitious substrates, and as anti-dust impregnator on concrete floors.
application_areas: Bonding primer under Mapefloor resin systems

mapei-mapeflex-pu-s25.name: MAPEFLEX PU S25
mapei-mapeflex-pu-s25.description: Low-modulus elastic polyurethane sealant specifically developed for sealing internal and external vertical expansion and construction joints. One-component moisture-curing.
application_areas: Internal and external vertical expansion joints

mapei-mapeflex-pu-45-ft.name: MAPEFLEX PU 45 FT
mapei-mapeflex-pu-45-ft.description: One-component, thixotropic, rapid-hardening paintable polyurethane sealant and adhesive with high modulus of elasticity. Dual-purpose: joint sealant AND flexible bonding adhesive. Solvent-free.
mapei-mapeflex-pu-45-ft.classification: ISO 11600 class F-20 HM (high-modulus); EN 15651-1 F-EXT-INT CC; EN 15651-4 PW-EXT-INT-CC
mapei-mapeflex-pu-45-ft.final_set: 24 h at 3.3 mm / 48 h at 5.2 mm / 7 days at 8.5 mm (at +20°C)
application_areas: Expansion joints on walls and floors
Flexible bonding of dissimilar materials (concrete, steel, aluminium, wood, glass, PVC)

mapei-ultrabond-eco-375.name: ULTRABOND ECO 375
mapei-ultrabond-eco-375.description: Adhesive in water dispersion with strong and quick initial bond, long open time and very low VOC, specifically for vinyl floors.
mapei-ultrabond-eco-375.classification: Water-dispersion vinyl floor adhesive (EMICODE EC1 Plus)
application_areas: Homogeneous & heterogeneous PVC/vinyl sheets and tiles

mapei-ultrabond-eco-170.name: ULTRABOND ECO 170
mapei-ultrabond-eco-170.description: Non-flammable carpet adhesive — acrylic water-dispersion adhesive with long open time for textile floor coverings including carpet tiles and broadloom.
mapei-ultrabond-eco-170.classification: Acrylic water-dispersion carpet adhesive (EMICODE EC1 Plus)
application_areas: Textile floor coverings with latex/PVC/polyurethane foam backing

mapei-ultrabond-eco-fix.name: ULTRABOND ECO FIX
mapei-ultrabond-eco-fix.description: Tackifier / release adhesive for loose-lay carpet tiles and PVC tiles. Water-based dispersion with a permanent tack — tiles can be repositioned or removed.
mapei-ultrabond-eco-fix.classification: Water-based tackifier / pressure-sensitive adhesive (EMICODE EC1 Plus)
application_areas: Raised access floors where tiles must be removable

mapei-ultrabond-eco-v4sp.name: ULTRABOND ECO V4SP
mapei-ultrabond-eco-v4sp.description: Multi-purpose acrylic adhesive in water dispersion with long open time and very low VOC. For laying rubber, PVC, vinyl, polyolephinic, linoleum and carpet flooring.
mapei-ultrabond-eco-v4sp.classification: Multi-purpose acrylic water-dispersion adhesive (EMICODE EC1 Plus)
mapei-ultrabond-eco-v4sp.application_method: N° 1 or 2 notched trowel, TKB A1/A2/B1/B2

mapei-ultrabond-turf-pu-1k.name: ULTRABOND TURF PU 1K
mapei-ultrabond-turf-pu-1k.description: Fast-setting, moisture-curing, one-component, polyurethane urethane adhesive specifically designed for bonding of synthetic turf jointing strips. Meets FIFA standards for sports turf bond strength. Indoor and outdoor use.
certifications: Meets FIFA requirements for sports turf

mapei-ultrabond-turf-2-star-pro-green.name: TURF 2 STAR PRO GREEN
mapei-ultrabond-turf-2-star-pro-green.description: Two-component, fast-set polyurethane adhesive for high-performance seaming and direct bonding of synthetic turf in athletic and landscape installations. Coloured green. Cures in 2-4 hours. Meets FIFA 2-STAR performance.
mapei-ultrabond-turf-2-star-pro-green.classification: Two-component polyurethane turf seam adhesive (FIFA 2-star certified)

coverage.notes: Coverage depends on trowel notch and turf backing

application_areas: Direct bonding of turf (low humidity, cool climate)

mapei-ultrabond-p909-2k.name: ULTRABOND P909 2K
mapei-ultrabond-p909-2k.description: Two-component, water and solvent-free polyurethane adhesive with very low VOC. 'Hard' category adhesive per EN 14293 for all types of wood/parquet flooring.
mapei-ultrabond-p909-2k.classification: EN 14293 'hard' class two-component polyurethane wood adhesive (EMICODE EC1 R Plus)
mapei-ultrabond-p909-2k.mix_ratio: Component A (PU polymer) + Component B (liquid hardener)
application_areas: Heated floors, anhydrite, ceramic, marble substrates

mapei-ultrabond-p990-1k.name: ULTRABOND P990 1K
mapei-ultrabond-p990-1k.description: Ready-to-use one-component, moisture-curing, solvent-free elastic polyurethane adhesive for pre-finished, multi-layered and traditional jointed solid wood parquet. ~30% higher yield than 2K products.
mapei-ultrabond-p990-1k.classification: EN 14293 one-component moisture-curing polyurethane wood adhesive
